title: RPG Nova Modpack
description: A Modpack designed for full fantasy immersion while still keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
A Modpack designed for full fantasy immersion while still keeping the vanilla feel.

With Better Combat, Better Nether and End, Create, and Mythic Metals, there is lots to see and play with!

The pack was originally made to be played with my friends but I was proud enough to post it here!


Honorable mod mentions:

Small Ships: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-ships

Xaero's Minimap: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap

Xaero's World Map: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map

Structory: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory

Capybara: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capybara-fabric
